channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The US could still try to play the ethnic card in Iran
item.description: But past experience and current geopolitical realities show such a strategy is doomed to failure.

item.title: ‘Smell’ of war comes to St Petersburg as Ukraine hammers Russian refineries
item.description: Ukraine aims to drain Russia's war chest with drone strikes on Pokrovsk and Ust-Luga oil facilities on the Baltic Sea.

item.title: How US operation to rescue air officer from Iran unfolded
item.description: President Trump says US service member whose fighter jet was shot down over Iran is rescued during two raids.

item.title: Has Trump confirmed Iran’s claim that protesters were US-armed?
item.description: US president says Washington armed Kurdish Iranian opposition groups during the January demonstrations.

item.title: Iran threatens Bab al-Mandeb closure: How would that affect world trade?
item.description: If the chokepoint were shut, along with the Strait of Hormuz, a quarter of the world's energy supply would be blocked.

item.title: Pakistan offers ‘two-phased’ truce deal to end US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Iran, while still reviewing the proposal, says it won't reopen Hormuz as part of a temporary ceasefire.

item.title: Trump’s ‘Bridge Day’ threat: Can a last-ditch ceasefire plan work?
item.description: Mediators Pakistan, Turkiye and Egypt are proposing a 45-day ceasefire plan. But Iran is reluctant.

item.title: Yemen’s civilians fear fallout after Houthis enter Iran war
item.description: Fears of air strikes and rising prices dominate everyday life in Sanaa as Yemen becomes embroiled in regional conflict.

item.title: Trump says US armed Iranian dissidents via Kurds, Kurdish groups deny claim
item.description: Trump's admission gives credence to Iranian assertion that the January protests were backed by the West to create chaos.

item.title: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed
item.description: Tehran says it will respond 'in kind' to attacks on its infrastructure, accuses Trump of inciting 'war crimes'.
